The MIT licence applies only to this HTML downloader code. Download responsibly. Please think before downloading if you really need all the selected data. MIT License text

ℹ Hail climatology

MESH (Maximum Expected Size of Hail) = radar-based maximum expected hailstone size. LEHA (Large Effective Hail Area) = area affected by large hail. Annual (y) and monthly parameters (m) can be selected by year. Anomaly (anom) and climate parameters (clim) as well. Climatological reference parameters (clim) refer to the reference year 2013 and cannot be selected by year. Return periods apply to 2002–2020 as a full period and can not be retrieved together with the other parameters (annual, monthly, anomaly or climate parameters) in a single request — please load them separately. The parameter list is loaded automatically from the STAC API.
